evidence.claim: The mechanistic linchpin was established by Inoki et al. in 2002: TSC2 is directly phosphorylated and inactivated by Akt, coupling growth-factor signaling to mTORC1 activity [PMID 12172553 ].

Loss of functional tuberin therefore constitutively activates mTORC1-dependent anabolic programs — increased protein synthesis, cell growth, and impaired autophagy — in all TSC lesions [PMID 27226234 , 29478616 ].
TSC2 variants account for ~70% of genetically confirmed TSC cases and are associated with a more severe neurological phenotype than TSC1 variants [PMID 41820375 ].

Isolated focal cortical dysplasia type II also scores 0.875 for genetic association, reflecting the growing recognition that somatic TSC2 mosaicism underlies a significant fraction of non-TSC focal cortical dysplasia [PMID 35963265 ].

The inheritance pattern is autosomal dominant with high penetrance for brain lesions (cortical tubers present in ~90% of patients) and near-complete penetrance for epilepsy (~85–90% lifetime risk) [PMID 23622183 , 38137462 ].

This ubiquitous CNS expression is consistent with TSC2's fundamental role in neuronal and glial mTOR regulation — cortical tubers, subependymal nodules, and subependymal giant cell astrocytomas (SEGAs) all arise from cells constitutively expressing TSC2, and mTORC1 dysregulation in neurons drives aberrant axonal development, synaptogenesis, and network excitability [PMID 38212374 ].

A separate mechanistic line of evidence from Parkinson's disease research showed that pathologic α-synuclein destabilizes the TSC1-TSC2 complex, activating mTORC1 and driving neurodegeneration, and that TSC2 overexpression was neuroprotective in fly models — supporting the idea that TSC2 functions as a broader neuronal survival regulator beyond TSC itself [PMID 38019930 ].

Everolimus ( CHEMBL1908360 , MW 958 Da, approved 2009) has received FDA and EMA approval for three TSC-related indications: renal angiomyolipoma, SEGA, and refractory seizures; sirolimus is approved for lymphangioleiomyomatosis [PMID 32222129 , 41820375 ].
I'll conduct a multi-source investigation across genetic, mechanistic, expression, and therapeutic evidence layers simultaneously.
